coverage: 100% of all reachable node types across 9 groups and 250 nodes.
validation: The authored case matches Blender's 71,755 / 71,104 topology and four-decimal local bounds exactly after running all 1,111 authored Blur Attribute iterations. Blender and GN-VM also share all 142,203 triangle indices in the same order; indexed positions differ by at most 0.000000581 units. A second line-thickness case matches Blender's four-decimal bounds and every face, with one fewer browser vertex.

surface_validation.method: Indexed Blender/GN-VM comparison using tools/export_blender_evaluated_mesh.py, followed by tools/mesh-surface-diff.ts --local

material.name: chrome.001
material.contract: Direct constant Principled: linear RGB 0.8, metallic 1, roughness 0, IOR 1.5, no emission and no linked inputs
material.residual: The measured studio longitude and intensity align broad reflection placement and mean exposure. Eevee and WebGL retain local PBR and environment-filter differences; pixel identity is not claimed.
